public static void AddValidationCallback(
	this IApiCompilationServices services,
	Func<Task> callback
)

Parameters

services
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIApiCompilationServices
callback
Type: SystemFuncTask

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IApiCompilationServices. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
